abstract.text: A
that can incrementally “print” an output value back into an input.

inlineContent.text: Printing is the reverse operation of parsing, so the
reverse. As such, new values should be prepended to the front of the input. This allows
parsers to check that the already-printed values match what is expected for any given

abstract.text: Parses a request’s headers using field parsers.

you only call this from other
conformances, not when you want to parse a concrete

if it fails.
